chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Revision Application No. 188 of 2021 (Taqi Raza and another vs. The State) Date Order with signature of Judges 1. For orders on M.A.No. 10252/2022 2. For orders on M.A.No. 9721/2022 3. For orders on office objection at flag A 4. For hearing of case 5. For hearing of M.A.No. 9618/2021 05.09.2022 Mr. M. Naeem Khan for applicants Mr. Faheem Hussain Panhwar, DPG -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgent application is granted. 2to5. It is stated by learned counsel for the applicants that the applicants on conclusion of the trial, the applicants were convicted under Sections 337-A(v) and 337-L(ii) PPC and sentenced to pay Arsh and Daman to the injured by learned Judicial Magistrate No. XVII, Karachi West vide judgment dated 02.03.2021, which they impugned by filing an appeal, it was dismissed by learned VIII-Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi West vide judgment dated 08.06.2021, which they have impugned before this Court. In the meanwhile, the Arsh/Daman payable by the applicants has been deposited with learned trial Magistrate by Al-Khidmat Welfare Society. By contending so, he does not press the disposal of instant Revision Application before this Court on merits provided the applicants are ordered to be released having served out the sentence/paid the Arsh/Daman amount, which is not opposed by learned DPG for the state. In view of above the instant Revision Application is dismissed as not pressed, applicants to be released in the present case, forthwith, if they have fulfilled/complied the terms of impugned judgments. Instant Revision Application is disposed of accordingly.

In view of above the instant Revision Application is dismissed as not pressed, applicants to be released in the present case, forthwith, if they have fulfilled/complied the terms of impugned judgments. Instant Revision Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
